channel.title: NonèCostanzo — Security Research
channel.description: Technical write-ups, CVE analysis, thoughts on Cloud, AI Security and Penetration Testing by Paolo Costanzo.

item.title: I Wanted to Write a Quick Article. I Dismantled a Criminal Org Instead.
item.description: A phishing email, an entire Easter vacation burned, and a rabbit hole that led to $13,960 stolen, infiltrated Telegram channels, mapped C2 infrastructure. Crypto Drainer-as-a-Service on the TRON network.

item.title: One GET, 169.254.169.254, IAM Credentials Served Fresh
item.description: IMDSv1 requires no authentication. One SSRF in your app is enough to steal EC2 IAM credentials. Capital One, 106 million records, $80M fine. HttpTokens: required has existed since 2019.

item.title: €40, 2 Minutes, and a Student Who'll Never Trust Free Wi-Fi Again
item.description: Cardputer-Adv in your pocket, Bruce firmware, and a class of professionals convinced they knew all about Wi-Fi. Evil Portal, beacon spam, deauth attack in the classroom.

item.title: Operation Epic Fury: What the Reports Missed
item.description: Original OSINT investigation into the Iranian dual-platform campaign targeting Israeli civilians. Undisclosed Windows payload, secondary C2 with 0/94 VT, infrastructure active 8 months before anyone noticed.

item.title: TIM, GeForce Now and the ICMP Black Hole
item.description: How I diagnosed and worked around an ICMP Black Hole on TIM's network that caused 10% packet loss on GeForce Now and capped bandwidth at 26 Mbps on a 1 Gbps line.

item.title: AWS IAM: The 5 Most Common Misconfigurations
item.description: Wildcard policies, root without MFA, exposed access keys, overly permissive roles and disabled logging. Five mistakes I see on every cloud audit — and how to fix them.

item.title: Prompt Injection on Enterprise LLMs: How It Really Works
item.description: Enterprise language models have attack surfaces almost nobody considers. A practical walk-through of how an attacker thinks when facing a corporate LLM wired into internal data.
